title: SOCIAL SERVICES - 211info
text: ST VINCENT DE PAUL LA PINE SOCIAL SERVICES OFFICE SOCIAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency food boxes, clothing for adults, household items (kitchenware and small appliances), prescription assistance, gas money (for job interviews or appointments), emergency motel vouchers, and ID assistance. 51484 Morson Road La Pine, OR 97739 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-noon and 12:30pm-2pm Email (541) 536-6135 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 536-6135 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of address AREA SERVED: Cities of Chemult, Christmas Valley, Crescent, and La Pine Services: Food Pantries Gas Money General Clothing Provision Homeless Motel Vouchers Kitchenware Prescription Expense Assistance Records/Licenses/Permits Fee Payment Assistance Small Kitchen Appliances Other Services Offered At This Location: MATERIAL GOODS - PUBLIC SHOWERS UTILITIES - EMERGENCY MIDSTATE ENERGY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ST VINCENT DE PAUL LA PINE SOCIAL SERVICES OFFICE
